title: You Really Got Me
why_this_song: You Really Got Me by The Kinks (1964) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "Girl, you really got me goin'"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You got me so I don't know what I'm doin' now"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You got me so I can't sleep at night"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You got me so I can't sleep at night"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You got me so I can't sleep at night"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "really" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Girl, you really got me goin'
See, don't ever set me free

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Kinks one question about "You Really Got Me", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Kinks sobre "You Really Got Me", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "You Really Got Me" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "You Really Got Me" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "You Really Got Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "You Really Got Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
